product_results.title: N I K E I N C Air Max Torch 4 002ANTHRACITE/SILVER 12

summary.text: These shoes receive positive feedback for their overall quality, with customers describing them as great and good. The comfort level is generally appreciated, with users finding them very nice and comfortable. The appearance stands out as a strong point, with customers noting they are great looking and stand out visually. However, customers have mixed opinions regarding the fit and durability of the shoes.

authors_reviews.title: Great shoe, but a bit snug.
authors_reviews.text: Really nice shoes for the price. A bit narrow and not much extra room. Really comfortable, though. Love it.
authors_reviews.author: Christopher McLarty

authors_reviews.title: My husband and nephews were pleased with their shoes
authors_reviews.text: I have to regret buy those shoes
authors_reviews.author: Stacey Ann brown

authors_reviews.title: Good shoes
authors_reviews.text: Just what I was looking for
authors_reviews.author: Curtis Hincke-Prevost

authors_reviews.title: Very disappointed
authors_reviews.text: Product seems to be as expected and of fairly good quality but I received one size 10 and one size 12 not sure what happened there. Very disappointing considering I waited two weeks to get them
authors_reviews.author: Terry s
